data.title: InventHelp Inventor Develops New Mixture for Frying Fish & Shrimp (TKC-400)
data.description: In Pittsburgh on June 12, 2026, an inventor from Winnsboro, S.C. shared their creation of Boyd's Seafood Lip Smacking recipe, which has been in development for 25 years. The inventor expressed a desire to provide a straightforward method for people to savor the tasty flavor when frying fish and shrimp.

data.title: urban-gro, Inc. Announces Shareholder Approval of Name Change to Flash Sports and Media, Inc. and New Ticker Symbol “FLZH”
data.description: The company has unveiled a new corporate identity to signify its shift towards the global sports and media sector after merging with Flash Sports & Media. The strategic transition is a result of the successful business combination, marking a significant milestone for the company. This move underscores the company's commitment to expanding its presence and influence in the sports and media industry. The rebranding aligns with the company's vision for growth and diversification in the market. It highlights the company's determination to capitalize on the opportunities presented in the evolving sports and media landscape. With this transformation, the company is poised to leverage its strengths and resources to drive success in the global market. This change reflects the company's strategic approach to remain competitive and make a mark in the industry.

data.title: AccuWeather CEO Steven R. Smith Winner of Greater Philadelphia EY Entrepreneur Of The Year® Award, Named National Finalist
data.description: A Philadelphia local and former intern at AccuWeather, Steven R. Smith, has recently been awarded a regional accolade for his exceptional leadership, innovative thinking, and significant business contributions. Smith, now serving as the CEO of AccuWeather, has also been selected as a national finalist for the prestigious EY Entrepreneur Of The Year® award after securing victory in the Greater (mention the region) region.

data.title: Newmont Announces Receipt of Common Shares of LunR Royalties Corp. by Way of Dividend-In-Kind from Lundin Gold Inc.
data.description: Newmont Corporation disclosed today that its subsidiary has been given 16,099,564 common shares in LunR Royalties Corp. through a dividend-in-kind from Lundin Gold Inc. This comes after Lundin Gold acquired 50,505,051 common shares of LunR. Newmont's shares are listed as NEM on the NYSE, ASX, and PNGX.

data.title: Lennar Posts Q2 Miss; Lower Incentives, Consumer Commentary Appear Positive Says Analyst
data.description: Lennar Corp's shares on the NYSE, under LEN, plummeted during early trading after the company's second-quarter revenues fell short of Wall Street's projections. Analyst James McCanless from Citizens JMP Securities rated the stock as Market Perform. Key Q2 points include: Total revenues were $7.9 billion, missing the estimated $8 billion; 20,500 closings were in line with forecasts; Average closing price was $371,000, $2,000 below expectations and a 5% drop from the previous year; GAAP gross margin decreased by 220 bps year-on-year to 15.6%, underperforming predictions. The company posted GAAP earnings of $1.24 per share, compared to last year's $1.81 per share. Explore more analyst ratings. For further details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Born in '41, Built for Now: Jeep® Brand Unveils the 2027 Jeep Wrangler Sarge
data.description: On June 12, 2026, in Auburn Hills, Michigan, the Jeep® brand launched the eighth limited-edition model in its Twelve 4 Twelve Wrangler series. This release draws inspiration from the original 1941 Willys MB but features enhanced modernized design and capabilities. The purpose-built exterior of this special edition showcases unique '41 Green accents, offering a fresh take on classic styling.

data.title: Bekins Launches Silver Certified™ Senior Moving Services
data.description: A recent announcement made in Indianapolis on June 11, 2026, revealed the introduction of Silver Certified™ by Bekins Van Lines. This innovative program aims to provide specialized training and certification tailored to meet the needs of seniors when moving. The initiative is designed to offer greater confidence and support to older adults during the moving process. This certification program marks a significant step in addressing the specific requirements of seniors, ensuring a smoother transition for them. With Silver Certified™, Bekins Van Lines is dedicated to enhancing the moving experience for older adults, highlighting their commitment to serving this demographic.

data.title: TeamLogic IT Honored with Pax8 Partner of the Year and MVP Security Awards
data.description: On June 12, 2026, TeamLogic IT, a reputable company offering managed IT services and technology support to businesses nationwide, was honored by Pax8, a prominent cloud commerce marketplace. They received the Partner of the Year – Franchise Award and the MVP Security Award for their exceptional performance. This recognition highlights their commitment to providing top-notch IT solutions.

data.title: Bloomberg Tax Report Examines Growing Debate Over State Data Center Tax Incentives
data.description: A report released by Bloomberg Tax on June 12, 2026, from Arlington, Virginia, delves into the increasing scrutiny placed on state tax incentives for data centers. Lawmakers are facing the dilemma of balancing the economic advantages of enticing significant technology investments with the escalating worries regarding these incentives. The report highlights the importance of assessing the impacts and potential drawbacks of attracting data centers from multiple perspectives. This development comes as the industry witnesses a surge in investment, with data centers becoming crucial infrastructure for various sectors. Lawmakers are under pressure to evaluate these incentives carefully, considering the implications on revenue generation and economic growth.

data.title: Inaugural 'Here Comes Summer' Benefit Fuels Lung Cancer Research, Honors Legacy of Donna Summer
data.description: The inaugural 'Here Comes Summer' benefit, hosted by the Lung Cancer Research Foundation (LCRF), took place in Nashville on June 9, 2026. The event, held at Richland Country Club, saw a sold-out crowd consisting of members from the music community, patients, and researchers. The benefit aimed to raise funds for lung cancer research.

data.title: University of Arizona Announces Landmark $14 Million PCORI-Funded Clinical Trial Comparing Three Leading Treatments for Obstructive Sleep Apnea
data.description: A new multi-center study involving 2,400 patients over a five-year period will provide the first extensive comparison of CPAP, oral appliance therapy, and pharmacological treatment for a certain condition. The study aims to generate comprehensive evidence on the effectiveness of these treatment options. Daybreak will assist in facilitating access to oral appliance therapy for participants of the study. Conducted by the University of Arizona, this research promises valuable insights into the management of the medical condition under investigation.

data.title: Dr. Jacqueline Youtsos Scholarship Opens 2027 Applications for Pre-Medical and Medical Students
data.description: The scholarship program, named after Dr. Jacqueline Youtsos, based in Pittsburg, Kansas, has launched its 2027 application period. Students in both undergraduate and medical school from all over the U.S. are encouraged to apply for a $1,000 scholarship. This initiative was established by a board-certified individual and aims to support the education of aspiring medical professionals.

data.title: Cepheid Delivers Xpert® Hemorrhagic Fever Panel Tests to Africa to Address Diagnostic Gaps in Ebola Bundibugyo Outbreak
data.description: Based in Sunnyvale, California, on June 12, 2026, Cepheid, a subsidiary of Danaher, disclosed its contribution of an initial supply of Xpert® Hemorrhagic Fever panel tests to aid in diagnosing the Ebola Bundibugyo (BDBV) outbreak in the Democratic Republic of the Congo (DRC). The donation aims to support the diagnostic efforts amidst the outbreak crisis.

data.title: /C O R R E C T I O N -- Acucraft Fireplaces/
data.description: Acucraft Fireplaces has recently announced the launch of the Blaze Open Collection, a new line of open-view gas fireplaces that set a higher standard in the industry. The news was released on 9th June 2026 through PR Newswire. The Blaze Open Collection offers innovative design and exceptional quality, marking a significant advancement in the company's product offerings. This collection is aimed at redefining the gas fireplace market, catering to the growing demand for cutting-edge and stylish heating solutions. Acucraft Fireplaces aims to revolutionize the industry by providing customers with a visually stunning and high-performing fireplace option. Stay tuned for more updates on the Blaze Open Collection as it promises to elevate the standards of gas fireplaces.

data.title: Lily & Lime Shares New Wedding Trend Findings Reflecting Shift Toward Personalized Celebrations
data.description: On June 12, 2026, in Los Angeles, a popular wedding photography company emphasized evolving preferences of contemporary couples, favoring authenticity and expertise over conventional standards. Lily & Lime shared recent internal research results showcasing shifting trends in weddings nationwide.

data.title: Tech Stocks' 'Big Tobacco Moment': What Battles Over Key Legal Shield Mean For Meta, Google
data.description: Lawsuit threats are mounting against tech giants such as Meta's Facebook and Google's YouTube due to the protection offered by Section 230, shielding them from liability for user-generated content. This legal shield is under siege as numerous lawsuits pose a potential threat to its longstanding protection. Investors are comparing this situation to the "Big Tobacco Moment," hinting at potential repercussions for Meta and Google. This development could have a significant impact on the tech industry as a whole and raises questions about the future of online platforms' legal responsibilities towards user content.
